title: Hepetis platypetala
intro: Hepetis platypetala, also known as Chinese chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that help to alleviate symptoms of fever, headache, and skin conditions, while also protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. Bioactive constituents of Hepetis platypetala include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is commonly used to make herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used as a powder or capsule for its health benefits.
